title: Chile Proposes $2.8 Billion Tax Credit Program to Drive Green Hydrogen Investment and Reindustrialization
content: Chileâ€™s Ministry of Energy is preparing a major legislative proposal aimed at jumpstarting domestic demand for green hydrogen (H2V), with a tax credit framework worth $2.8 billion designed to close the gap between project proposals and actual investment. The upcoming bill is a key piece of the Green Hydrogen Action Plan and aims to ease investment decisions for producers and industrial users alike.
author: Analysts Account
